name.description: The name of the packet mirroring rule

network.description: Specifies the mirrored VPC network. Only packets in this network will be mirrored. All mirrored VMs should have a NIC in the given network. All mirrored subnetworks should belong to the given network. Structure is [documented below](#nested_network).

url.description: The full self_link URL of the network where this rule is active.

collector_ilb.description: The Forwarding Rule resource (of type load_balancing_scheme=INTERNAL) that will be used as collector for mirrored traffic. The specified forwarding rule must have is_mirroring_collector set to true. Structure is [documented below](#nested_collector_ilb).

url.description: The URL of the forwarding rule.

mirrored_resources.description: A means of specifying which resources to mirror. Structure is [documented below](#nested_mirrored_resources).

subnetworks.description: All instances in one of these subnetworks will be mirrored. Structure is [documented below](#nested_mirrored_resources_subnetworks).

instances.description: All the listed instances will be mirrored.  Specify at most 50. Structure is [documented below](#nested_mirrored_resources_instances).

tags.description: All instances with these tags will be mirrored.

description.description: A human-readable description of the rule.

region.description: The Region in which the created address should reside. If it is not provided, the provider region is used.

priority.description: Since only one rule can be active at a time, priority is used to break ties in the case of two rules that apply to the same instances.

filter.description: A filter for mirrored traffic.  If unset, all traffic is mirrored. Structure is [documented below](#nested_filter).

ip_protocols.description: Possible IP protocols including tcp, udp, icmp and esp

cidr_ranges.description: IP CIDR ranges that apply as a filter on the source (ingress) or destination (egress) IP in the IP header. Only IPv4 is supported.

direction.description: Direction of traffic to mirror. Default value is `BOTH`. Possible values are: `INGRESS`, `EGRESS`, `BOTH`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

url.description: The URL of the subnetwork where this rule should be active.
The URL of the instances where this rule should be active.
